response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of experience, but the role requires a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. Resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at current role started April 2025, no AI/ML academic background, no evidence of advising strategic customers, and no track record of director-level technical leadership or industry recognition in AI.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source founder
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Lacks director-level IC scope; titles top out at Staff/Senior, no strategic advisory experience
Experience profile is ~14 years, just under the 15-year minimum, with no advanced AI degree

key_factors.factor: No principal/director-level scope or strategic advisory track record
Strong engineering craftsmanship and recent agentic AI tooling work
